---
title: "get_market"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_market()`

Get Single Market

## Usage

```r
get_market(ticker, kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API", demo = FALSE)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. The market ticker (e.g., "KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54"). |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with complete market details.

## Description

Retrieves detailed information for a specific market by ticker.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
market <- get_market("KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54")
market$title

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other markets: 
`get_candlesticks()`,
`get_markets()`,
`get_orderbook()`,
`get_trades()`
